commit.subject: LU-19326 utils: improve return codes from ssk load key
commit.message:
LU-19326 utils: improve return codes from ssk load key

Improve return codes from functions that load SSK keys, with this
behavior:
- ret > 0       client file system key id if successfully loaded
- ret == 0      other key type successfully loaded
- ret < 0       -errno on failure

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-1
Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-dne-selinux-ssk-part-2
